title: BC5CDR Chemical-Disease Relation Extraction
description: Schema for chemical and disease entity extraction and chemical-induced-disease (CID) relation extraction from PubMed abstracts, based on the BioCreative V CDR dataset. Captures Chemical and Disease entities with MeSH identifiers and document-level CID relations.

entities.description: Chemical and disease named entities extracted from the text.

text.description: The entity mention text as it appears in the passage.

type.description: The semantic type of the entity.

identifier.description: MeSH identifier for the entity (e.g., D009270). Value is -1 when no MeSH mapping exists.

offset.description: Character offset of the entity mention in the full document text.

length.description: Character length of the entity mention.

relations.description: Document-level Chemical-Induced-Disease (CID) relations between a chemical and a disease, identified by their MeSH identifiers.

chemical.description: MeSH identifier of the chemical entity.

disease.description: MeSH identifier of the disease entity.
